tagline: Pay with anything. Receive USDC. Invisibly.

overview.activePath: v2 — Customer signs CCTPv2 burn on Ethereum Sepolia → Iris v2 attestation (~30-90s Fast Transfer) → server admin wallet calls receiveMessage on Arc → merchant receives USDC
overview.legacyPath: v1 (still in code for rollback) — BSC swap via SwapRouter.swapAndBridge → CCTP or ADMIN_RELAY → Arc mint
overview.strangler: NEXT_PUBLIC_BRIDGE_BACKEND=v2|v1 toggle; rollback = flip 2 env vars on Vercel + redeploy (~2 min)
overview.uxPromise: Invisible: customer signs 2 txs (approve + depositForBurn), watches progress bar, merchant receives USDC on Arc

contracts.status: LEGACY (v1) — scheduled for deletion in Phase 06 full after Vercel v2 + 48h smoke

SwapRouter.sol.entryFn: swapAndBridge(sessionId, grossUSDC, aigFee, amountInMax, poolFee, merchantBytes32, merchantAddr)

apiRoutes.POST /api/agent/quote: v1 ONLY (legacy) — fetch PancakeSwap spot price + calc fees; v2 PaymentPageV2 does not call this. Currently returns 500 if invoked due to viem checksum on hardcoded Quoter fallback address.
apiRoutes.POST /api/agent/execute: SSE stream (v1 OR v2 branch on BRIDGE_BACKEND env). v2 (active): pollAttestationV2 (CCTPv2 Iris) → receiveMessage on Arc (non-blocking receipt). v1 (rollback): pollSwapCompleted (BSC) → CCTP or admin relay. Pipeline anchored in ReadableStream.start() callback for Vercel serverless function lifetime safety.

libModules.lib/agent.ts: v1 only — fetchSpotPrice (PancakeSwap Quoter), calculateSwapParams, updateSessionStatus (Supabase upsert)
libModules.lib/cctp.ts: pollAttestationV2 (CCTPv2 Iris v2 endpoint, used by v2), receiveMessage (Arc MessageTransmitter, non-blocking receipt wait). v1 helpers (extractMessageHash, extractRawMessage, pollAttestation, V1_BSC_SOURCE, SourceChainConfig) retained for rollback.
libModules.lib/cctp-abi.ts: minimal ERC20 approve + CCTPv2 TokenMessengerV2 depositForBurn (7-arg Fast Transfer) ABI
libModules.lib/payment-flow-v2.ts: usePaymentFlowV2 client hook: switchChain → USDC.approve(TokenMessenger) → TokenMessenger.depositForBurn(amount, ARC_DOMAIN=26, mintRecipient, USDC, destCaller=bytes32(0), maxFee=amount/1000, minFinality=1000) → POST /api/agent/execute

pages./pay/[id]: dispatch on NEXT_PUBLIC_BRIDGE_BACKEND: PaymentPageV2 (active) or PaymentPage v1 (legacy). v1 component to be deleted in Phase 06 full.
pages./dashboard: Merchant dashboard — Pencil UI, QR generator, real-time payment feed, points tier, stat cards

tables.payment_sessions: session_id (unique), status, bridge_mode, merchant_wallet, customer_wallet, target_usdc, swap_params (JSONB)

external.Circle CCTP: Domain 7 (Arc) — TokenMessenger.depositForBurn → MessageTransmitter.receiveMessage; attestation via Circle API
external.Arc Network: Settlement chain (chain ID 212) — USDC mint destination

v2 CCTPv2 Fast Transfer (PRIMARY, active.destinationChain: Arc Testnet (CCTP domain 26 — NOT 7 which is Polygon)
v2 CCTPv2 Fast Transfer (PRIMARY, active.flow: client approve(USDC->TokenMessengerV2) + depositForBurn(amount, 26, mintRecipient, USDC, destCaller=0, maxFee=amount/1000, minFinality=1000) → server pollAttestationV2(iris-api-sandbox.circle.com/v2/messages/0?transactionHash=tx) → server admin wallet receiveMessage(message, attestation) on Arc MessageTransmitter
v2 CCTPv2 Fast Transfer (PRIMARY, active.fee: ~1bps protocol fee deducted at mint (merchant receives amount - ~0.01% on standard route)

v1 CCTP (BSC, LEGACY).flow: BSC SwapRouter.swapAndBridge → SwapCompleted event → extract MessageSent log → keccak256 hash → poll Circle v1 API (5s interval, 120s timeout) → Arc receiveMessage
v1 CCTP (BSC, LEGACY).status: rollback path only; v2 is default backend post Phase 04

v1 ADMIN_RELAY (BSC, LEGACY).flow: BSC SwapCompleted → 30s receipt poll → Supabase atomic guard (status=PENDING) → admin wallet USDC.transfer on Arc

paymentInitiationV2: Customer opens URL → PaymentPageV2 renders amount + Connect button
Customer connects wallet (wagmi injected) → switchChain to Sepolia (11155111)
paymentExecutionV2: Client POST /api/agent/execute with burn txHash → SSE stream
Server emit swap_executing → bridging → pollAttestationV2 → receiveMessage on Arc → emit confirmed(arcTxHash)

keyDesignDecisions.stranglerFigToggle: NEXT_PUBLIC_BRIDGE_BACKEND=v1|v2 + BRIDGE_BACKEND mirror — codebase carries both paths until Phase 06 full cleanup; rollback = 2 env flips on Vercel + redeploy
keyDesignDecisions.sseInReadableStreamStart: /api/agent/execute pipeline runs INSIDE ReadableStream.start() callback so Vercel serverless function lifetime ties to controller.close(); fire-and-forget runPipeline-after-return pattern was cut at ~2-3s on prod (Vercel docs: function ends when handler returns)
keyDesignDecisions.nonBlockingArcReceipt: receiveMessage returns Arc txHash as soon as writeContract resolves; waitForTransactionReceipt fires detached. SSE confirmed event means "tx submitted to Arc mempool", not "tx mined" — keeps total SSE under ~3s within Vercel limits
keyDesignDecisions.cctpV2FastTransfer: maxFee = amountWei/1000n (>0 required) + minFinalityThreshold=1000 enables Fast attestation (~30-90s) vs Standard finalized wait (~15min)
keyDesignDecisions.irisV2Endpoint: pollAttestationV2 queries /v2/messages/{sourceDomain}?transactionHash — returns BOTH raw message + attestation; replaces v1 extract-from-receipt + poll-by-messageHash chain
keyDesignDecisions.atomicIdempotency: Supabase .eq("status","PENDING") prevents duplicate transfers on retry (v1 admin relay)
keyDesignDecisions.clientSideOnly: Payment + dashboard pages are use client — wagmi needs browser env

security.auth: Wallet-based identity (Phase 1 PoC, no auth system)
security.privateKeys: AIG_ADMIN_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY env-only, server-side only; required for receiveMessage on Arc
security.inputValidation: sessionId (string), swapTxHash (0x[64hex]), merchantWallet (0x[40hex]), targetUSDC (positive number) at /api/agent/execute boundary
security.txFinality: v2 SSE confirmed = tx submitted (mint mines on Arc asynchronously); merchant should reconcile via dashboard polling
security.timeouts: pollAttestation v1=120s; pollAttestationV2=180s; v1 pollSwapCompleted=30s; receiveMessage receipt wait=60s (detached)

removed_in_phase06_partial: ARC_CCTP_DOMAIN_ID=7 (was Polygon domain bug; v2 uses NEXT_PUBLIC_ARC_CCTP_DOMAIN=26)

external.PancakeSwap V3 (BSC Testnet): v1 only — Quoter + Router; not used by v2
external.Circle CCTPv2 (active): Sepolia source domain=0, Arc dest domain=26. Iris sandbox https://iris-api-sandbox.circle.com/v2. Fast Transfer allowance ~100k USDC available 30/05
external.Arc Network: Settlement chain — USDC mint destination via MessageTransmitter 0xE737e5cEBEEBa77EFE34D4aa090756590b1CE275
external.Vercel: Frontend hosting; serverless function maxDuration=60 needed on /api/agent/execute for SSE pipeline
